/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC  -g -O0 -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libblue.so -o ../lib/libblue.so CMakeFiles/blue.dir/blue/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blue.dir/blue/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blue.dir/blue/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blue.dir/blue/mthread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blue.dir/blue/fiber.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blue.dir/blue/schedular.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blue.dir/blue/iomanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blue.dir/blue/timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blue.dir/blue/hook.cpp.o
